name: Aerospace & Defence Analytics
overview: Queensland’s aerospace and defence sector, heavily concentrated around the Amberley RAAF Base and major manufacturing hubs across Greater Brisbane, demands absolute precision and extreme data security. Defence contractors frequently struggle with opaque, highly-classified supply chains, rigid Department of Defence compliance reporting, and disjointed engineering telemetry. Roar Data, Brisbane’s premier defence analytics consultancy, engineers impenetrable, ITAR-compliant Power BI dashboards. We fuse complex engineering lifecycle data, rigorous quality assurance logs, and secure supply chain tracking. This empowers QLD defence executives with real-time, undeniable factual authority to optimise manufacturing velocity and guarantee absolute military-grade compliance.
whoIsItFor: ["Defence Prime Contractors managing large-scale manufacturing and sustainment from Greater Brisbane hubs.", "Aerospace Engineering Directors tracking complex CAD lifecycles and component reliability.", "Supply Chain & Quality Managers enforcing strict ITAR and Department of Defence procurement standards."]
commonProblems: ["Siloed, highly-classified data systems prevent real-time visibility into mission-critical supply chain bottlenecks.", "Inability to correlate rapid engineering revisions with resultant manufacturing delays and cost blowouts.", "Manual, sluggish compilation of mandatory Department of Defence compliance reports introduces severe contractual risk."]
useCases: ["Secure, ITAR-compliant supply chain tracking and component traceability dashboards.", "Interactive engineering lifecycle, CAD revision velocity, and defect tracking models.", "Automated Department of Defence operational readiness and contract compliance scorecards."]
kpis: ["Component First Pass Yield (FPY)", "Supply Chain Lead Time Variance", "Engineering Defect Escape Rate", "Contractual Compliance Percentage"]
dataSources: ["SAP (Defence & Security Modules)", "Teamcenter (Siemens)", "Oracle NetSuite", "Secure Government EDI feeds"]

name: Aged Care Analytics
overview: Queensland’s aged care sector, expanding rapidly from inner Brisbane suburbs to extensive regional coastal networks, operates under relentless regulatory scrutiny and continuous funding pressures. Residential facility managers consistently wrestle with disconnected clinical care software that obscures true patient acuity, inflates agency rostering costs, and risks severe Royal Commission compliance breaches. Roar Data, a dedicated Brisbane analytics consultancy, builds secure, highly-sensitive Power BI architectures specifically for aged care. We overlay clinical incident reporting with dynamic workforce rostering and AN-ACC funding models. This empowers QLD aged care directors to optimise nurse-to-resident ratios, ruthlessly protect clinical quality, and absolutely guarantee sustained government funding.

name: Mining & Natural Resources Analytics

Resource executives are constantly battling fragmented operational data across regional pit sites, complex supply chain logistics, and highly volatile commodity pricing. name: Human Resources & People Analytics
overview: For Chief Human Resources Officers steering vast workforces from Brisbane’s corporate sector, predicting workforce attrition and optimising labour expenditure is a critical mandate. HR directors are constantly hindered by disconnected payroll platforms, lagging recruitment tracking, and siloed employee engagement surveys, preventing any proactive workforce strategy. Roar Data, Brisbane’s premier people analytics consultancy, deploys highly secure, executive-grade Power BI architectures for the HR suite. We fuse live headcount telemetry, complex remuneration variances, and predictive churn metrics. This provides QLD HR executives with undeniable factual authority to aggressively stem expensive talent attrition, accelerate recruitment velocity, and enforce optimal workforce deployment.
